pi_items.source: Environment setup scripts (setup_libreoffice_base.sh) confirm database is copied from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb to /home/ga/chinook.odb
Task description and verifier.py both specify this exact table name

Queried official Chinook SQLite database from github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. Found exactly 3 employees with SupportRepId customers: Employee 3 (Jane Peacock), Employee 4 (Margaret Park), Employee 5 (Steve Johnson). All other employees have no customers.
Chinook database query: SELECT FirstName || ' ' || LastName FROM Employee WHERE EmployeeId=3
Chinook database: COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerId) WHERE SupportRepId=3 equals 21
Chinook database: COUNT(DISTINCT InvoiceId) for customers of employee 3 equals 146
Chinook database: SUM(Invoice.Total) for customers of employee 3 equals 833.04
Chinook database query: SELECT FirstName || ' ' || LastName FROM Employee WHERE EmployeeId=4
Chinook database: COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerId) WHERE SupportRepId=4 equals 20
Chinook database: COUNT(DISTINCT InvoiceId) for customers of employee 4 equals 140
Chinook database: SUM(Invoice.Total) for customers of employee 4 equals 775.4 (numerically equivalent to 775.40)
Chinook database query: SELECT FirstName || ' ' || LastName FROM Employee WHERE EmployeeId=5
Chinook database: COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerId) WHERE SupportRepId=5 equals 18
Chinook database: COUNT(DISTINCT InvoiceId) for customers of employee 5 equals 126
Chinook database: SUM(Invoice.Total) for customers of employee 5 equals 720.16

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database), a real public sample music store database. The database contains exactly 3 sales support representatives: Jane Peacock (ID 3) with 21 customers and 146 invoices totaling $833.04, Margaret Park (ID 4) with 20 customers and 140 invoices totaling $775.40, and Steve Johnson (ID 5) with 18 customers and 126 invoices totaling $720.16. All metadata claims about database location, table name, expected row count, and ground truth values have been independently verified against the official Chinook SQLite database.
